Where fashion
meets hair.

22 inches of 100% Cuticle Remy Hair, available in 10 professional shades — from deep Black to Ice Platinum.

Engineered for
seamless application.

The Hairtown 22" Tape Extension is built around a unique 6cm tape that delivers wider coverage per section, reducing application time while creating a flatter, more natural-looking result against the scalp.

All hair is sourced as 100% Cuticle Remy — meaning cuticles run in the same direction from root to tip. This dramatically reduces tangling, maintains natural movement, and allows the extensions to be coloured and styled like natural hair.

Each pack contains 6 pieces, each with the unique 6cm tape,, providing a full head of volume or targeted length for most clients.

Length22 inches (55cm)
MethodSkin Weft Tape-In
Tape Width6cm — unique extended tape
Pieces per Pack6 pieces
Tape Width6cm per piece
Hair Type100% Cuticle Remy Human Hair
Cuticle DirectionAligned root to tip
Colours Available10 professional shades
ReusabilityRe-tapeable · up to 3 applications
Heat StylingCompatible up to 180°C
Suitable forColouring, toning, styling

The 6cm tape
difference.

Standard tape extensions use a 4cm tape. Our unique 6cm tape provides 50% more bonding surface — creating a flatter, more secure attachment that sits closer to the scalp and requires fewer pieces to achieve the same coverage.


Less pieces. Less time. Better result. It's the detail that makes the difference for both stylist and client.

Simple. Professional.

The 6cm tape design makes application faster and more precise. Follow these steps for a seamless result.

01

Section the Hair

Create a clean horizontal section approximately 1cm from the nape. The section should match the width of the 6cm tape for a seamless bond.

02

Place the Tape

Peel and place the first tape extension adhesive-side up under the section. Lay the natural hair flat over the tape weft.

03

Sandwich & Press

Place the second tape extension adhesive-side down on top, sandwiching the natural hair. Press firmly for 3–5 seconds along the full 6cm tape.

04

Repeat & Blend

Continue sectioning upward. Once all pieces are placed, press a flat iron on low heat over each bond for 1–2 seconds to fully activate the adhesive.

Maintenance & Care

Avoid applying oils or conditioners directly to the tape bonds. Use a sulphate-free shampoo and brush from mid-length downward. Extensions can be re-taped up to 3 times using professional tape replacement adhesive.

3x
Re-tapeable
180°
Max heat
